zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Baldwin於1623年2月8日出生在英國巴金哈姆爾阿斯頓 克林頓時，他的父親Richard Baldwin38歲，母親Phillipa Cockman36歲。他於1649年11月1日與Phebe Richardson在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1699年2月14日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本享年76歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Baldwin于1623年2月8日出生在英国巴金哈姆爾阿斯頓 克林頓时，他的父亲Richard Baldwin38岁，母亲Phillipa Cockman36岁。他于1649年11月1日与Phebe Richardson在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1699年2月14日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本享年76岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本。

nameMeanings.name: Baldwin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and North German: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements bald ‘bold, brave’ + wine ‘friend’, which was extremely popular among the Normans and in Flanders in the early Middle Ages. It was the personal name of the Crusader who in 1100 became the first Christian king of Jerusalem, and of four more Crusader kings of Jerusalem. It was also borne by Baldwin, Count of Flanders (1172–1205), leader of the Fourth Crusade, who became first Latin Emperor of Constantinople (1204). In North America, this surname has absorbed Dutch forms such as Boudewijn.
Irish: surname adopted in Donegal by bearers of the Gaelic surname Ó Maolagáin (see Milligan ), due to association of Gaelic maol ‘bald, hairless’ with English bald.
History: A John Baldwin from Buckinghamshire, England, arrived in the US in 1638 and settled in Milford, CT.

variants.name: Milligan
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Maolagáin ‘descendant of Maoileagán’, a personal name from a double diminutive of maol meaning ‘bald’ or ‘tonsured’.

variants.name: Baldovino
meanings: Hispanic (mainly Philippines and Colombia) and Italian: from the personal name Baldovino, from ancient Germanic Baldowin (see Baldwin ).

variants.name: Bellmann
meanings: North German:
habitational name for someone from Belle in Westphalia, Bell in the Rhineland, or Bellen near Bremen.
in Saxony, from a pet form of the ancient Germanic personal name   Baldwin  .

variants.name: Bais
meanings: Dutch (mainly North Holland): patronymic from the personal name Baije, which is a derivative of an ancient Germanic name beginning with the element bern- ‘bear’, or possibly a variant of Boije, which may be a derivative of Boidin and thus a variant of Baldwin .
Italian (Friuli Venezia Giulia and Trentino-South Tyrol): nickname derived from German weiss ‘white’.

Americanized form of Croatian and Slovenian Bajs: nickname from dialect bajs ‘bass’ (the musical instrument), figuratively ‘fatty, potbelly’. The surname in the form Bais is found in Croatia, too, where it is a less common variant.

variants.name: Baudoin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Etienne, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Firmin, Francoise, Jean-Yves, Laurent, Minos, Sylvain.
French: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements bald ‘bold, brave’ + win ‘friend’ (see Baldwin ). Compare Boudoin 1 and Bowdoin .
Altered form of French   Beaudoin  , a cognate (variant) of 1 above.

variants.name: Bald
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Inge, Karl-Heinz, Konrad, Kurt, Otto.
German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Baldo, or a short form of various compound names such as Baldwin , formed with the first element bald ‘bold, strong’.

Scottish and English: from the Norman personal name Bald(e), Baud(e), occasionally Bold, a short form of the common ancient Germanic personal names Baldwin or Baldric, or possibly a survival of Old English Beald (compare Balding ); the relevant element in each of these is b(e)ald ‘brave’. As a hereditary surname it seems to have died out in England but survives in Scotland.

variants.name: Balkin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Emanuel, Herschel.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the Yiddish female personal name Beyle meaning ‘beautiful’ (related to French belle).

English (of Norman origin): perhaps from an unrecorded Middle English personal name Baldekin, Baudekin, an Anglo-Norman borrowing of Middle Dutch Baudequin, a Flemish pet form of Baldwin . However, a clear link between Middle English Baudekin and post-medieval Balkin has not been established, and the modern name may have a different source, a variant of Balcom perhaps, by migration.

variants.name: Bawden
meanings: English: from a late variant of the Norman personal name   Baldwin   or a variant of   Bowden  .

variants.name: Baldon
meanings: English: habitational name from either Marsh Baldon or Toot Baldon in Oxfordshire, from the Old English personal name Bealda + dūn ‘hill’, or a variant of Baldwin . Occasionally the name may be from Baildon in Yorkshire (named with Old English bēgel ‘bend’ + dūn ‘hill’; recorded as Baldon in the 16th century), or from Ballidon in Derbyshire (named with Old English belg ‘bag, sack’ + denu ‘valley’).
English: variant of   Boldon  .
Italian (Veneto): from an augmentative of the personal name   Baldo  .

variants.name: Beaudoin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Marcel, Andre, Serge, Jacques, Gilles, Laurent, Normand, Pierre, Alcide, Lucien, Raoul.

French: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements bald ‘bold, brave’ + win ‘friend’ (see Baldwin ). Compare Baudoin , Baudouin , Beaudion , Boadway , Boardway , Bodeau , Bodoh , Bodway , Boudway , and Budway .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Baldwin was born on 8 February 1623, in Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Richard Baldwin, was 38 and his mother, Phillipa Cockman, was 36. He married Phebe Richardson on 1 November 1649, in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 14 February 1699, in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 76, and was buried in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Baldwin est né le 8 février 1623, à Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Baldwin, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Phillipa Cockman, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Phebe Richardson le 1 novembre 1649, à Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 14 février 1699, à Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Baldwin am 8. Februar 1623 in Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Baldwin 38 und seine Mutter Phillipa Cockman 36. Er hat am 1. November 1649 in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Phebe Richardson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 14. Februar 1699 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Baldwin è nato il il 8 febbraio 1623 nel Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Richard Baldwin, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Phillipa Cockman, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Phebe Richardson il 1 novembre 1649, nel Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 14 febbraio 1699, nel Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.Woburn City, Middlesex, Massachusetts Ba: アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスウオブルン
ja.Ashton, Clinton, Buckinghamshire, Englan: イギリスブクインガムシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Henry Baldwinが1623年2月8日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアアストン クリントンで生まれた時，父Richard Baldwinは38歳，母Phillipa Cockmanは36歳であった。1649年11月1日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンでPhebe Richardsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1699年2月14日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンで76歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンにて埋葬された。

ko.Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay, Br: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번
ko.Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번
ko.First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번
ko.lifeSummary: Henry Baldwin(이)가 1623년 2월 8일 영국 벅잉함실르 애스턴 클린턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Baldwin(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Phillipa Cockman(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1649년 11월 1일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에서 Phebe Richardson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1699년 2월 14일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Baldwin nasceu em 8 de fevereiro de 1623, em Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Baldwin, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Phillipa Cockman, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Phebe Richardson em 1 de novembro de 1649, em Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de fevereiro de 1699, em Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay, Br: вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Col: вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex,: вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Baldwin родился 8 февраля 1623 г. в местности астон клинтон, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Baldwin было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Phillipa Cockman, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Phebe Richardson 1 ноября 1649 г. в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 14 февраля 1699 г. в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Baldwin nació el 8 de febrero de 1623, en Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Baldwin, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Phillipa Cockman, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Phebe Richardson el 1 de noviembre de 1649, en Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 14 de febrero de 1699, en Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
